description_long: This pedestrian adult is depicted as a rugged, tribal-inspired figure with a distinctive mohawk hairstyle and blue face paint. The individual wears a thick, fur-lined shoulder cape over a layered outfit consisting of leather and fabric garments, including arm and leg wraps, and a belted tunic. Accessories include a large circular medallion on the chest, a pouch and a rolled-up blanket or mat attached to the belt, and a sheathed sword hanging at the hip. The footwear appears to be sturdy, reinforced sandals suitable for rough terrain. The overall appearance suggests a character prepared for survival or combat, with a mix of practical and decorative elements. The figure's posture is upright and alert, with arms slightly extended and feet firmly planted.
description: A rugged, tribal-inspired adult with a mohawk, fur-lined cape, layered leather garments, and survival accessories, standing upright and alert. The figure carries a sword, pouch, and rolled mat, exuding a prepared and resilient presence.
description_view_0: Front view shows the mohawk, blue face paint, fur cape, medallion, layered clothing, and accessories including sword, pouch, and rolled mat.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the mohawk, face paint, sword at the hip, and the rolled mat attached to the belt.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the full fur cape, the draped fabric, and the attachment points of the pouch and mat, with the back of the footwear visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the sword, mat, and arm/leg wraps, with the mohawk and face paint profile.
attribute_clothing_type: tribal-inspired layered outfit with fur-lined cape, leather tunic, arm and leg wraps, and utility belt
